nav.adminEmailsDescription: Monitor email sending and manage Resend API configuration

home.subtitle: Browse projects and discover items for sale in your area
home.heroValueWishlistDesc: Build a wishlist and contact sellers
home.signInPrompt: Sign in to see full item details, save favorites, and contact sellers
home.noProjectsDesc: As soon as sellers publish projects near you, they'll show up here.
home.noSearchResultsDesc: Try a different keyword or clear your search to see all projects.

auth.emailSent: Check your email for a magic link
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists
auth.confirmationSent: We sent you a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
auth.passwordChangedDescription: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.

account.emailVisibilityDesc: Choose whether other users can see your real email address. Regardless of this setting, you always receive notifications at your registered address.
account.visibilityHiddenDesc: Your email stays private. Conversations happen inside the app; we send you a notification email when there's a new message.
account.visibilityDirectDesc: Your email is shown to your counterparty when they also chose direct mode.

project.title: Project
project.noItemsDesc: The seller hasn't added any items to this project yet. Check back soon.
project.noMatchingItems: No items match the current filter
project.contactViaAppHint: Email stays private — send a message via the app.
project.guestOverlayTitle: Sign in to view this project
project.guestOverlayBody: Create a free account or sign in to see item photos, prices and contact the seller.

item.title: Title
item.reservedForYouAlert: This item is reserved for you. Contact the seller to arrange pickup.
item.soldAlert: This item has been sold and is no longer available.
item.signInToSeeDetails: Sign in to see full details
item.guestBody: Sign in or create an account to see full photos, pricing and contact the seller.
item.inSelectionNotice: This item is in your selection
item.finalizeInSelection: Go to your <link>selection page</link> to finalize your purchase intent.

wishlist.title: My Selection
wishlist.confirmRemove: Remove this item from your favorites?
wishlist.unavailableItemsWarning: {count, plural, one {# item is} other {# items are}} no longer available and will not be included in your intent.
wishlist.noAvailableItems: All items in this project are reserved or sold. You cannot submit a purchase intent.

intent.title: Purchase Intent
intent.submitted: Your purchase intent has been sent

messages.title: Messages
messages.sendCopy: Send me a copy by email
messages.contactSellerIntro: Send a message about {project} to {seller}. Your real email stays hidden unless you've chosen to share it.
messages.privacyNotice: Your email address stays private. The seller replies inside the app and you'll be notified by email.

seller.noProjects: No projects yet. Create your first project!
seller.noProjectsDesc: Group your items into projects to organize your sales — for example by location, by estate, or by type.
seller.noItems: No items in this project yet.
seller.noItemsDesc: Add your first item with photos, a price, and a description. Buyers will see it as soon as the project is public.
seller.markSoldDescription: The reserved buyer will be carried over as the purchaser.
seller.noReservations: No reserved items in this project.
seller.reservationItemCount: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} reserved
seller.recapEmailDescription: Send this buyer an email with a summary of their reserved items and a personal message.
seller.recapEmailPlaceholder: Add a personal message (pickup details, payment info, etc.)

reservations.title: My Reservations
reservations.empty: No items are currently reserved for you.
reservations.description: These items have been reserved for you. Contact the seller to arrange pickup and payment.

purchases.title: My Purchases
purchases.empty: You haven't purchased any items yet.

invitations.visibilityPublicHint: Anyone signed in can view this project.
invitations.visibilityInvitationHint: Only invited buyers can view items.
invitations.toggleConfirmBody: Changing visibility will reset all invitations, pending requests, and granted accesses for this project. Buyer data (wishlists, messages, intents) is preserved.
invitations.createTargetedHint: A personal code is generated. The user gets access automatically once signed in.
invitations.genericCodeHint: One active code per project. Users who enter it create a pending request.
invitations.lockedBody: This project is accessible by invitation only. Enter an invitation code or request access from the seller.
invitations.messagePlaceholder: Add a short note for the seller…
invitations.pendingBody: Your request is awaiting the seller's response. You'll be notified by email and in-app.
invitations.declinedBody: You can try again with a valid code or ask the seller again.
invitations.codeForAnotherUser: This code is tied to another email. You can still request access manually.
invitations.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
